Vertoiz

Settings

Extension setup

Settings

Use these values when the VS Code or Cursor extension asks for your Vertoiz API URL and auth token.

Vertoiz API Token

Generate a long-lived token for the VS Code or Cursor extension. Paste the returned vtz_ token when the extension asks for your Vertoiz auth token.

Token

Generate a token to display it here.

Railway Backend URL

Configure this as the Vertoiz API URL in the extension so scans are sent to your Railway backend.

API URL

https://vertoiz-production.up.railway.app
Open backend
